loop1.title: Today's Energy
loop1.note: Showing total, active, and reactive energy for the selected period; SEC, subsidy, and target metrics are not measured for this asset.

loop1.title: Power Energy Analysis
loop1.note: Showing active and reactive power demand profiles — rated and contracted power reference lines are omitted because the asset's nameplate ratings are unknown.

loop1.title: Input vs Output Energy
loop1.note: Showing HV-to-LV delivery loss and efficiency — per-phase loss/efficiency isn't measured for this asset; deltaPct is bound to load factor as a proxy.

loop1.title: Load Anomalies
loop1.note: Showing load anomaly events and load factor derived from active power and rated capacity; dip/surge events and Y-axis scalars are not measured by this meter.

loop2: GIC-01-N9-Solar Incomer-1 has no logged data — every card renders its real component with per-leaf-null leaves (honest empty). 262 data-bearing alternative(s) offered in the picker.
